constraint.description: Transactional methods must not be invoked from the same class or from a subclass within the inheritance hierarchy if the transactional semantics of the invoked method requires a change to the current transaction handling.
constraint.cypher: // If the target transaction semantics is SUPPORTS, the transaction handling will not change regardless of the source transaction semantics. It is therefore handled separately in the WHERE clause. // The transaction semantics 'NONE' is assigned to methods neither implicitly (class-level) nor explicitly (method-level) annotated as transactional. WITH [ {sourceTxSemantics: 'REQUIRED', targetTxSemantics: 'REQUIRED'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'REQUIRES_NEW', targetTxSemantics: 'REQUIRED'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'MANDATORY', targetTxSemantics: 'REQUIRED'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'NESTED', targetTxSemantics: 'REQUIRED'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'NEVER', targetTxSemantics: 'NEVER'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'NOT_SUPPORTED', targetTxSemantics: 'NEVER'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'NEVER', targetTxSemantics: 'NOT_SUPPORTED'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'NOT_SUPPORTED', targetTxSemantics: 'NOT_SUPPORTED'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'REQUIRED', targetTxSemantics: 'MANDATORY'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'REQUIRES_NEW', targetTxSemantics: 'MANDATORY'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'MANDATORY', targetTxSemantics: 'MANDATORY'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'NESTED', targetTxSemantics: 'MANDATORY'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'NONE', targetTxSemantics: 'NEVER'}, {sourceTxSemantics: 'NONE', targetTxSemantics: 'NOT_SUPPORTED'} ] as semanticsCombinationsWithoutTransactionChange MATCH (artifact:Artifact)-[:CONTAINS]->(callingType:Java:Type), (callingType)-[:DECLARES]->(sourceMethod:Method), (callingType)<-[:DECLARES*0..]-(:Java:Type)-[:EXTENDS|IMPLEMENTS*0..]->(:Java:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(targetTxMethod:Method:Spring:Transactional), path = (sourceMethod)-[invokes:INVOKES*]->(targetTxMethod) WITH callingType, sourceMethod, COALESCE(sourceMethod.transactionPropagation, 'NONE') AS sourceTxSemantics, targetTxMethod, targetTxMethod.transactionPropagation AS targetTxSemantics, path, invokes WHERE // Violations are direct calls from callingMethod to calledMethods and those with synthetic or private methods in between ALL(intermediateMethod IN nodes(path)[1..-1] WHERE (intermediateMethod.synthetic IS NOT NULL AND intermediateMethod.synthetic OR intermediateMethod.visibility = 'private')) AND NOT ( artifact:Test OR callingType:Generated // Synthetic callers themselves are not handled as violations since the developer cannot control their generation OR (sourceMethod.synthetic IS NOT NULL AND sourceMethod.synthetic) // Private callers themselves are not handled as violations since only non-private callers are relevant regarding transaction handling OR sourceMethod.visibility = 'private' OR ( {sourceTxSemantics: sourceTxSemantics, targetTxSemantics: targetTxSemantics} IN semanticsCombinationsWithoutTransactionChange ) // If the targetTxMethod has the SUPPORTS semantics, it never changes the current transaction OR targetTxMethod.transactionPropagation = 'SUPPORTS' ) RETURN DISTINCT callingType as Type, sourceMethod AS SourceMethod, sourceTxSemantics AS SourceTransactionalSemantics, targetTxMethod as TargetTransactionalMethod, targetTxSemantics AS TargetTransactionalSemantics, invokes[0].lineNumber as LineNumber ORDER BY Type.fqn, SourceMethod.name, TargetTransactionalMethod.name

constraint.description: Private methods must not be annotated with "org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional", "jakarta.transaction.Transactional" or "javax.transaction.Transactional".
constraint.cypher: MATCH (artifact:Artifact)-[:CONTAINS]->(type:Java:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method {visibility: "private"}), (method:Method)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->()-[:OF_TYPE]->(annotationType:Java:Type) WHERE annotationType.fqn in [ "org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional", "jakarta.transaction.Transactional", "javax.transaction.Transactional" ] AND NOT ( artifact:Test OR type:Generated ) RETURN type as Type, method as Method

concept.description: Provides transactional methods as ":Spring:Transactional:Method" and its configured transaction propagation semantics.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(transactionalMethod:Spring:Transactional:Method) RETURN type as Type, transactionalMethod as TransactionalMethod, transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation as TransactionPropagation ORDER BY type.fqn, transactionalMethod.signature

concept.description: Label all methods which are annotated with "@org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional", "jakarta.transaction.Transactional", or "javax.transaction.Transactional", with "Spring" and "Transactional". It further identifies method level transaction propagation semantics. The configured transaction propagation at method level overrides the type level configuration.
concept.cypher: WITH [ { annotationFqn: 'org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional', propagationAttributeName: 'propagation' }, { annotationFqn: 'jakarta.transaction.Transactional', propagationAttributeName: 'value' }, { annotationFqn: 'javax.transaction.Transactional', propagationAttributeName: 'value'} ] as supportedAnnotationTypes UNWIND supportedAnnotationTypes AS supportedAnnotationType MATCH (type:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(transactionalMethod:Method), (transactionalMethod:Java:Method)-[:INHERITED_FROM*0..]->(definedMethod:Java:Method)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(annotation:Java:Annotation), (annotation)-[:OF_TYPE]->(annotationType:Type {fqn: supportedAnnotationType.annotationFqn}) OPTIONAL MATCH (annotation)-[:HAS]->(propagation:Value {name: supportedAnnotationType.propagationAttributeName})-[:IS]->(propagationType:Java:Field) WITH type, transactionalMethod, COALESCE(SPLIT(propagationType.signature,' ')[1], 'REQUIRED') AS effectivePropagationType WHERE NOT definedMethod.visibility = "private" SET transactionalMethod:Spring:Transactional SET transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation = effectivePropagationType RETURN type as Type, transactionalMethod as TransactionalMethod, transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation AS TransactionPropagation

concept.description: Label methods of classes which are directly or indirectly annotated with "@org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional", "jakarta.transaction.Transactional", or "javax.transaction.Transactional" with "Spring" and "Transactional". It further identifies type level transaction propagation semantics. The configured transaction propagation at type level applies to declared methods.
concept.cypher: WITH [ { annotationFqn: 'org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional', propagationAttributeName: 'propagation' }, { annotationFqn: 'jakarta.transaction.Transactional', propagationAttributeName: 'value' }, { annotationFqn: 'javax.transaction.Transactional', propagationAttributeName: 'value'} ] as supportedAnnotationTypes UNWIND supportedAnnotationTypes AS supportedAnnotationType MATCH (transactionalClass:Type)-[:EXTENDS|IMPLEMENTS*0..]->(:Type)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(annotation:Java:Annotation), (annotation)-[:OF_TYPE]->(annotationType:Type {fqn: supportedAnnotationType.annotationFqn}), (transactionalClass)-[:DECLARES]->(definedMethod:Java:Method)<-[:INHERITED_FROM*0..]-(transactionalMethod:Java:Method) OPTIONAL MATCH (annotation)-[:HAS]->(propagation:Value {name: supportedAnnotationType.propagationAttributeName})-[:IS]->(propagationType:Java:Field) WITH transactionalClass, transactionalMethod, COALESCE(SPLIT(propagationType.signature,' ')[1], 'REQUIRED') AS effectivePropagationType WHERE NOT ( definedMethod:Constructor OR (definedMethod.static IS NOT NULL and definedMethod.static) OR definedMethod.visibility = "private" ) SET transactionalMethod:Spring:Transactional SET transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation = effectivePropagationType RETURN transactionalClass as TransactionalClass, transactionalMethod AS TransactionalMethod, transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation AS TransactionPropagation
